summary: The reproduction confirms that a low-privilege admin can update a downloadable link sample_url to a file:// target and that the public sample-download route returns the chosen local file contents.
expected_security_impact: Running the bundle should show that an unrelated low-privilege admin can persist a file:// sample_url and that an unauthenticated request to the public downloadable sample route receives the server-local secret file contents.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh cloned commit 62b11d9fe61e511ae878a02b4040cf66125d9404, built the reproduction image, seeded the application, and executed the bundled Pest test. The run reported PASS for DownloadableSampleUrlReadTest with 11 assertions and emitted EVOHUNT_SUCCESS: downloadable sample_url local file read reproduced.
verification_method: The automated Pest test asserts that admin.catalog.products.update is absent from the ACL role map, logs in as a custom-role admin with unrelated permissions, updates a downloadable link so sample_url points at a local secret file, logs out, requests the public shop.downloadable.download_sample route, and verifies that the response downloads the exact secret file contents.
evidence_produced_by_run: EVOHUNT_SUCCESS: downloadable sample_url local file read reproduced

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit or ref, and mounts that checkout into the container.
